title: koeleria calderonii
intro: Koeleria calderonii, also known as Calderon's Koeleria, is a type of grass native to Mexico, classified under the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Koeleria calderonii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Koeleria calderonii is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it may be used as a topical application for skin conditions.
